source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A large square is divided into smaller squares. In one of the smaller squares a diagonal is also drawn, as shown. What fraction of the large square is shaded? <image1>

asset_registry_record.registry_passed=true and image_manifest contains an existing image
multi_step: the prompt asks for a fraction of the large square, which typically requires identifying shaded parts and relating them to the whole
question_text mentions both subdivision into smaller squares and a diagonal in one square, suggesting combination of whole-square and partial-square area reasoning
the problem is geometry/area based rather than direct visual recognition, indicating at least modest multi-step reasoning
scored conservatively because the exact diagram structure is not available in the text fields
verifiability: answer_type=short_text with a precise fractional answer
multiple-choice options are provided and answer_text matches one option (E = 1/2)
the target output is a single mathematical value, which is easy to check
